display.purpose: Main dashboard header and brand identity title.

title.purpose: Section inner cards and lists title text.

body.purpose: General dashboard text, task items description, message logs.

components.name: Primary Send Button
components.description: Trigger button inside the chat interface to send text commands.
components.css: .ds-btn-send { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; background: #c9a227; border: none; border-radius: 12px; color: #0d150f; padding: 14px 28px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-btn-send:hover { background: #dbb63b; } .ds-btn-send:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c9a227; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Log Habit Button
components.description: Button on habit items to log completion.
components.css: .ds-btn-log-habit { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; background: rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.12); border: 1px solid rgba(201, 162, 39, 0.25); color: #c9a227; padding: 8px 18px; border-radius: 8px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-log-habit:hover { background: #c9a227; color: #0d150f; } .ds-btn-log-habit:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c9a227; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Delete Action Button
components.description: Quiet delete action button for list items.
components.css: .ds-btn-delete { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; background: transparent; border: none; color: #6b7280; cursor: pointer; font-size: 14px; padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: 4px; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); position: relative; } .ds-btn-delete::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: -10px; left: -10px; right: -10px; bottom: -10px; } .ds-btn-delete:hover { color: #ef4444; background: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.1); } .ds-btn-delete:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #c9a227; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Chat Command Input
components.css: .ds-chat-input { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; width: 100%; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.05); border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 12px; padding: 14px 18px; color: #f3f4f6; font-size: 16px; outline: none; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-chat-input:focus { border-color: #c9a227; }

components.name: Opaque Panel
components.description: Base panel container style for dashboard containers.
components.html:
Panel Heading
Panel content goes here.
components.css: .ds-panel { font-family: 'Outfit', sans-serif; background: #0f1712; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: var(--shadow-panel, 0 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.3)); display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; width: 100%; max-width: 320px; } .ds-panel-header { padding: 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08); font-size: 20px; font-weight: 600; color: #f3f4f6; } .ds-panel-body { padding: 24px; font-size: 16px; color: #9ca3af; }

narrative.overview: A sleek, dark cockpit for personal productivity, designed for single-user daily tracking. It balances a high-contrast data layout with a single solid gold/amber highlight and sharp, clear divisions, ensuring the user can digest their day in under 10 seconds. Every visual element has a functional purpose, prioritizing clean typography and flat, clean layouts over heavy borders.
keyCharacteristics: Deep, dark forest base (#0d150f) with solid opaque green panels.
Solid Accent Gold for primary highlights, buttons, and active states.
High-density data layout utilizing the clean, geometric Outfit typeface.
Tactile, responsive micro-interactions that respect accessibility preferences.

rules.name: The 10% Accent Rule
rules.body: Accent colors (Gold, Red) should collectively occupy less than 10% of any screen. Their rarity ensures high visibility.

rules.name: The High-Contrast Text Rule
rules.body: All body copy must maintain a minimum contrast ratio of 4.5:1 against its background. Never use text lighter than Cool Gray (#9ca3af) on cards.

rules.name: The Outfit Only Rule
rules.body: Do not introduce any other font families. All hierarchy must be expressed through Outfit's weight and opacity scale.

rules.name: The Frost Border Rule
rules.body: Elevation changes are denoted by subtle color differences and a translucent frost border (rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08)), never solid black or high-contrast borders.

dos: Do respect the user's reduced-motion preference by disabling transforms and transitions when requested.
Do use rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.08) for container boundaries to maintain a soft glass border.
donts: Don't use Notion-style corporate blue or generic SaaS cream/beige backgrounds (Obsidian light, Bear, Things 3) which represent the generic AI app default.
Don't use fitness-app neon orange (Strava orange or MyFitnessPal) or motivational gamification badges that create visual noise.
Don't fall back to monospace "developer cosplay" hacker terminal green-on-black aesthetics.
Don't add notification indicators, red badges, or infinite scroll elements that trigger user anxiety.
Don't use backdrop-filter/blur, gradients, or colored/tinted glow shadows anywhere — flat opaque surfaces, solid accent colors, and neutral (black-only) shadows or no shadow.
